nasb.text: Because Aram, with Ephraim and the son of Remaliah, has planned evil against you, saying,

esv.text: Because Syria, with Ephraim and the son of Remaliah, has devised evil against you, saying,

cnv.text: 因為亞蘭、以法蓮和利瑪利的兒子，設惡謀要害你，說：

ccb.text: 亚兰王和以法莲及利玛利的儿子阴谋毁灭他，

csbs.text: 尽管亚兰王和以法莲王利玛利的儿子策划恶事要害你，说：
